name: universal_store
description: Allows the assistant to search for and install regular Linux applications (Flatpak/APT).

actions.name: store_search
actions.description: Searches for an application to install. Payload: 'app name or keyword'.

actions.name: store_install
actions.description: Installs an application by ID or name. Payload: 'application_id' (e.g., 'org.mozilla.firefox').
